name: ZymCTRL
description: Given a Enzymatic Commission (EC) number, generate protein sequences to fulfill the catalytic reaction. Generate ordered and globular enzymes distant to natural ones, while maintaining intended catalytic properties.
capabilities: Given a Enzymatic Commission (EC) number, generate protein sequences to fulfill the catalytic reaction
Generate ordered and globular enzymes distant to natural ones, while maintaining intended catalytic properties

ecNumber.description: Enzymatic Commission (EC) number specifying the catalytic reaction

numSequences.description: Number of enzyme sequences to generate

maxLength.description: Maximum length of generated enzyme sequences
